behavior_summary: This script implements a minimal 'U8P_CANOPY::look' (examine) handler for the canopy. When the player examines the canopy, the U8P_CANOPY::look process emits a single short bark text 'canopy' and then suspends/terminates.
No global flags are read or written and there are no calls to external game systems. The function's sole visible effect is to present the brief description string.
Process type 0x0208 indicates this is the engine's examine/U8P_CANOPY::look process for the object.
notable_control_flow: U8P_CANOPY::look is a single-entry process that runs when the canopy is examined and immediately issues a bark followed by a suspend (end/pause of the U8P_CANOPY::look process).
There is no branching, menu logic, or external calls; control flow is linear and terminative after emitting the string.
open_questions: Is the bark text 'canopy' a localization key or the literal displayed string in-game?
Does the engine treat the observed 'suspend' as a full termination of the U8P_CANOPY::look process or as a short pause (affects whether subsequent engine processing resumes immediately)?

main_function.name: U8P_CANOPY::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short, immediate description when the player examines/looks at the canopy by emitting a single bark text 'canopy' and ending the U8P_CANOPY::look process.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the player 'U8P_CANOPY::look' or examine action on the canopy (engine U8P_CANOPY::look/examine event).
Process type 0x0208 (U8P_CANOPY::look/examine handler) used by the engine for object inspection.

function_map.name: U8P_CANOPY::look
function_map.role: Look/examine handler that emits a short description ('canopy') and suspends the process.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements a minimal 'U8P_CANOPY::look' (examine) handler for the canopy. When the player examines the canopy, the U8P_CANOPY::look process emits a single short bark text 'canopy' and then suspends/terminates.
